description: Only RoundRobinStrategy and LeastActiveStrategy exist; no weighted or adaptive routing strategies for production traffic where channels have different capacities
proposed_solution: Add WeightedRoundRobinStrategy and RandomStrategy to algorithms/; extend ILoadBalancerStrategy to support optional weight parameter; update factory/provider to register new strategies

description: AsyncChannelPool does not periodically probe channel health; health_check() only cleans idle channels by timeout but never sends pings to verify liveness — dead channels may be selected
proposed_solution: Add PeriodicHealthChecker that monitors channels via send/receive health ping every interval; update ChannelRef.is_healthy based on probe results; wire into CommunicationFabricAssembler startup
